task_completion.description: Configure the boundingObject for the MOBILE_ROBOT node as a Box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the 'MOBILE_ROBOT' node is expanded and its 'boundingObject' field is set to a 'Box' node (no longer NULL).

task_completion.description: Set the dimensions of the MOBILE_ROBOT Box bounding object.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'size' field under the Box node in the MOBILE_ROBOT's boundingObject is set to approximately 0.4, 0.2, 0.3.

task_completion.description: Configure the boundingObject for the OBSTACLE_BOX node as a Box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the 'OBSTACLE_BOX' node is expanded and its 'boundingObject' field is set to a 'Box' node (no longer NULL).

task_completion.description: Set the dimensions of the OBSTACLE_BOX Box bounding object.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'size' field under the Box node in the OBSTACLE_BOX's boundingObject is set to approximately 0.6, 0.6, 0.4.

task_completion.description: Configure the boundingObject for the OBSTACLE_CYLINDER node as a Cylinder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots Scene Tree, the 'OBSTACLE_CYLINDER' node is expanded and its 'boundingObject' field is set to a 'Cylinder' node (no longer NULL).

task_completion.description: Set the dimensions of the OBSTACLE_CYLINDER bounding object.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'radius' and 'height' fields under the Cylinder node in the OBSTACLE_CYLINDER's boundingObject are set to approximately 0.2 and 0.5 respectively.

task_completion.description: Save the corrected world to the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots saving the file to '/home/ga/Desktop/collision_fixed.wbt', or a terminal command confirming the file was saved/copied to this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor to modify the world file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Webots application open with the Scene Tree being actively navigated/modified, or a text editor explicitly editing the .wbt file, rather than using a hidden script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or adjusted the dimension values rather than relying on defaults.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or clicking to change the size/radius/height fields in the Webots interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent performed a genuine save or copy operation to create the final file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save World As...' dialog in Webots, a 'Save' action in an editor, or a terminal command like 'cp' being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The target output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/collision_fixed.wbt'. The required bounding objects and dimensions are: MOBILE_ROBOT (Box, size: 0.4 0.2 0.3), OBSTACLE_BOX (Box, size: 0.6 0.6 0.4), and OBSTACLE_CYLINDER (Cylinder, radius: 0.2, height: 0.5). A 50% tolerance is acceptable for all dimensions.
